nasb.text: and longing to be fed with the crumbs which were falling from the rich man’s table; besides, even the dogs were coming and licking his sores.

esv.text: who desired to be fed with what fell from the rich man’s table. Moreover, even the dogs came and licked his sores.

cnv.text: 想得財主桌子上掉下來的零碎充飢；並且有狗來舔他的瘡。

ccb.text: 他渴望吃到财主桌上掉下来的食物残渣，却只有狗来舔他的疮。

csbs.text: 渴望得到财主桌子上掉下来的碎渣充饥，甚至有狗来舔他的疮。
